title: A Look At Affirm Holdings (AFRM) Valuation As Credit Delinquency Concerns Pressure Online Lenders
text:
A Look At Affirm Holdings (AFRM) Valuation As Credit Delinquency Concerns Pressure Online Lenders

Affirm Holdings faces valuation pressure as credit delinquency concerns weigh on the buy-now-pay-later sector. The company's delinquency rates have come under scrutiny as early stage credit delinquencies rise across borrower tiers.

Key Points:
- Affirm's credit quality remains a focal point for investors evaluating the company
- Delinquency management is central to the company's underwriting strategy
- Competition from PayPal, Klarna, and Afterpay adds pressure on margins and growth
- The company has implemented proactive underwriting adjustments to manage credit risk

Affirm continues to differentiate itself through proprietary underwriting models and risk management practices, including no late fees policy that supports customer loyalty.
